Name | Estimated Delivery | Price | No shipping options | Apply | Overview | Contact Us | Complete high-quality food for adult small-breed dogs, with lamb, rice, and tapioca. | I | t contains a single source of animal protein* | – lamb – making it not only highly palatable but also suitable for dogs with allergies. This food is ideal for supporting the health of small dogs. | Optimal balance: | The recipe is balanced to meet the needs of adult dogs living a normal lifestyle. | Immunity: | Added zinc helps support proper immune system function. | Good digestion: | Fructooligosaccharides (inulin), with prebiotic effects, help promote healthy digestion. | Joint support: | Glucosamine and chondroitin sulfate are added to support the musculoskeletal system. | Skin and coat care: | A balanced ratio of Omega-6 and Omega-3 fatty acids helps maintain healthy skin and a shiny coat. | Ingredients: | Lamb 38% (of which 80% is dehydrated lamb and 20% is hydrolyzed fresh lamb), rice, corn, tapioca, corn flour, oils and fats, dried beet pulp, dried chicory pulp (source of inulin), fish oil (source of Omega-3), dried sweet carob pulp, minerals, chondroitin sulfate 0.06%, glucosamine 0.05%. | Analytical components: | Crude protein 30%, crude fat 15%, crude fiber 3%, crude ash 8.5%, calcium 1.6%, phosphorus 1.2%. Metabolizable energy: 3,620 kcal/kg – 15.1 MJ/kg. | Additives per kg: Nutritional additives: | Vitamin A (retinyl acetate) 30,000 IU/kg, Vitamin D3 1,600 IU/kg, Vitamin E (all-rac-alpha-tocopheryl acetate) 70 mg/kg, choline chloride 3,500 mg/kg, selenium (sodium selenite in coated granules 0.4 mg/kg) 0.2 mg/kg, manganese (manganese sulfate, monohydrate 92 mg/kg) 30 mg/kg, zinc (zinc oxide 149 mg/kg) 120 mg/kg, copper (copper sulfate (II) pentahydrate 39 mg/kg) 10 mg/kg, iron (iron sulfate (II) monohydrate 304 mg/kg) 100 mg/kg, iodine (anhydrous calcium iodate 2.4 mg/kg) 1.6 mg/kg, L-carnitine 100 mg/kg, DL-methionine 1,500 mg/kg. | Technological additives: | Sodium tripolyphosphate, antioxidants. | Sensory additives: | Botanically defined natural products: Sweet chestnut (Castanea sativa) 1,000 mg/kg. | Feeding instructions: | recommended daily amount: see the table on the packaging. Your dog may eat more or less than indicated depending on age, temperament, or activity level. When introducing REAL DOG food for the first time, gradually transition over at least seven days. The food can be given dry or slightly moistened with warm water.
